authentication.instructions: Send USDC on Base to the recipient address, then include the tx hash in the X-Payment-Tx header.

tools.name: register_agent
tools.description: Register a new AI agent with metadata, dependencies, permissions, and tags.

tools.name: update_agent
tools.description: Update metadata for an existing agent.

tools.name: query_agents
tools.description: Search and filter agents by owner, status, tag, or name. Supports pagination.

tools.name: dashboard
tools.description: Fleet-wide status: counts, health summary, stale agents, recent registrations.

tools.name: dependency_graph
tools.description: Dependency graph of all active agents.

tools.name: compliance_report
tools.description: All agents with permissions, health, and staleness for compliance.

tools.name: report_health
tools.description: Record a health check result for an agent.

tools.name: export_agents
tools.description: Export full registry in JSON or CSV format.
